about_text:
IdleTrigger v1.2.0

Stay Awake      Prevent system sleep, optionally keep screen on
Idle Monitor    Auto-trigger sleep/hibernate/shutdown/lock
                after a configurable idle timeout
Global Hotkeys  Win+Shift+S (sleep) / L (lock) / N (stay awake)
Battery Aware   Auto-disable stay-awake on battery power
Process Watch   Auto-enable stay-awake for specific apps
CLI & IPC       Full command-line support with tray communication

https://github.com/JeffioZ/idletrigger
msg_idle_warning: IdleTrigger: %s in %d s — move mouse or press any key to cancel.
cli_usage:
Usage: IdleTrigger <command>

Commands:
  sleep        Suspend system
  hibernate    Hibernate system
  shutdown     Shut down system
  lock         Lock workstation
  nosleep      Stay Awake (on|off|toggle|status)
  monitor      Idle monitor (on|off)
  autostart    Auto-start (enable|disable|status)
  status       Show current state
  version      Print version
cli_unknown: Unknown command. Run without arguments to start the tray icon.
